name: New Mexico-Style Barbecue Sauce (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add the onion and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until translucent.
3. Stir in the tomatoes and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Mix in the remaining ingredients.
5. Simmer for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Puree the mixture using a blender or food processor.
7. Pour into a bowl and allow to cool at room temperature.
8. Store the sauce in the refrigerator for up to one week, or freeze for several months.
Yield: 5 cups
